item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 031930Z AUTO 06002KT 9999 SCT033/// BKN041/// BKN050/// ///CB 16/14 Q1011 TEMPO 4000 SHRA
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 031917Z 0319/0418 24005KT 9999 SCT025 PROB40 TEMPO 0319/0322 4000 TSRA SCT040CB BECMG 0321/0324 VRB02KT PROB40 TEMPO 0321/0406 VRB10KT 4000 SHRA SCT040CB PROB40 TEMPO 0403/0406 BKN008 TEMPO 0412/0418 4000 SHRA SCT025CB PROB30 TEMPO 0414/0418 2000 TSRA SCT025CB
